market_research_surfaces.public_safe_note: Draft problem-hypothesis questions only; no market validation, customer evidence, or product-market proof is claimed.
Draft target-user questions only; no contact, personal data, customer research, or buyer evidence is claimed.
Draft market-category questions only; no category readiness, market-size proof, or market validation is claimed.
Draft similar-platform inventory questions only; no private profile, scraped data, benchmark, or superiority claim is recorded.
Draft differentiation questions only; no moat, leadership, benchmark win, legal protection, or market superiority is claimed.
Draft pricing-assumption questions only; no price, package, checkout, paid access, or published public-offer value is recorded.
Draft validation-plan questions only; no survey, interview, outreach, waitlist, beta, or customer access is opened.
Draft public-claim review questions only; no market, customer, investor, launch, or deployment claim is promoted.
Draft risk-obligation questions only; no privacy, support, legal, cost, investor, or customer duty is treated as satisfied.
Draft evidence-promotion questions only; no market, customer, pricing, investor, publication, or deployment claim is promoted.

next_action: keep market research preparation local; do not publish surveys, open waitlists, contact people, claim market validation, claim product-market fit, claim competitor superiority, publish pricing or public offers, create investor materials, collect personal data, open customer access, move money, publish externally, or deploy without a later signed witness
